• Being a sorcerer and having to deal with the troubles of it was everything. But, at least he had you along with him. The two of you have been through thick and thin, and no matter what, he’d never let you get hurt without himself hurting first.

His head is rested onto your shoulders, his demon dog cuddled up in your lap as your hand strokes its ears. The two of you have been close ever since you’ve joined Jutusu high, a school for sorcerers. And ever since, you’ve been together!
